verses.text: Tua hun sungteng Saul in Topa' thu a um mite thahdingin a hanciamna zomlai hi. Siampi lianpenpa kiangah pai a
Topa' thu a zui mi numei pasal a muh peuhpeuh manin Jerusalem khua-ah a ciahpih theihna dingin Damaskas khua-a Jew mi kikhopna inn ukte kiangah a lah dingin lai a ngen hi
Damaskas khua a zuan dingin pai a, a tun' dektak ciangin thakhat thu-in van panin ama kimkotah a hong tangzaih khat a om hi
Saul, leilakah puksuk a, tua laitakin awging khat in ama kiangah, “Saul, Saul aw, bang hangin kei hong bawlsia na hi hiam?” a ci hi
Saul in, “Topa aw, kua na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Nangmah in na hong bawlsiat Jesuh ka hi hi
Ahi zongin tho-in khuapi sungah lut in; tua lai panin na gamtatna dingteng hong kigen ding hi,” a ci hi
Saul tawh a tonkhawm mite in a awging a zak uh hangin kuamah mulo uh ahih manin lamdangsa lua-in pau theilo liangin a om uh hi
Saul zong leilak panin thoto a, a mit a hah hangin khua mu theilo hi. Tua ahih manin a kikholhpihte in a khutin lenin Damaskas khua-ah a paipih uh hi
Ni thum sung khua mu theiloin, anletui zong a ne kei hi
Tua laitakin Damaskas khua-ah Ananias min nei thu um mi khat a om hi. Amah in maang mu a, a maang sungah Topa in, “Ananias aw,” ci-in a sam hi. Ananias in, “Topa aw, ka om hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Ananias kiangah, “Kithawi-in Kongzing Tang gei-a Judas inn-ah va pai in la, Tarsas khuami Saul min nei mi khat va kan in. Tua Saul in thu ngen a
khua a muhkik theihna dingin Ananias min nei mi khat hong pai-in ama lu tungah a khut a ngakna thu, a maang muhna sungah a mu hi,” a ci hi
Ahi zongin Ananias in, “Topa aw, hih mipa in Jerusalem khua-a om nangma mite a bawlsiatna thu khempeuh, mi tampi tak in kei tungah hong gen khinzo uh hi
Tu-in zong nangmah a hong bia mi khempeuh a mattheihna dingin siampi liante tung panin thu a ngahkhit ciangin Damaskas khua-ah a hong tung ahi hi,” a ci hi
Ahi zongin Topa in Ananias kiangah, “Gentail mite, kumpite, leh Israel mite tungah keima min a kitheisak ding, keima na a sem dingin teelkhin ka hih manin ama kiangah va pai in
Keima hangin a thuakding thu khempeuh zong, keimahmah in ama tungah ka gen ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ahih manin Ananias zong pai a, innsungah a lutkhit ciangin Saul lu tungah a khut nga a, “Sanggam Saul aw, hih lai-ah nong pai lai-in nangma tungah a hong kilang Jesuh mahmah in kei hong sawl hi. Nangmah in khua muthei kikin, Kha Siangtho tawh na kidim theihna dingin nangma kiangah a hong paisak ahi hi,” a ci hi
Tua laitakin Saul' mit panin ngasalip tawh a kibang na pawlkhat kia a, khua a mukik thei hi. Saul zong tui kiphumpah a
an a nekkhit ciangin a tha hong hatkik hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Saul in Damaskas Khua-ah Thu Hilh

verses.text: Kikhopna innte-ah va pai-in, “Jesuh pen Pasian' Tapa ahi hi,” ci-in thu hilh ding a kipan hi

Ama thuhilh a za mi khempeuh in lamdangsa uh a, “Pasian a bia mi peuhpeuh, Jerusalem khuasungah a thatpa hilo ahi hiam? Hih lai-ah zong thu um mite manin siampi liante kiangah a ciahpihkik dingin a hong pai hilo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Ahi zongin a thuhilhna-ah Saul hong siam semsem a, Jesuh pen Khrih hi, ci-in teltakin lakthei ahih manin, Damaskas khua-a om Jew mite in a nialna ding uh om theilo hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jew Mite Kiang Panin Saul Suakta

verses.text: Tuazawh ni tampi khit ciangin Jew mite kikaikhawmin Saul thahsawm uh a
ahi zongin Saul in amah a kisawm lamtak na phawk hi. Jew mite in Saul a thahtheihna dingun a sun a zanin khua kongpi-ah a pang uh hi
Ahi zongin Saul' nungzuite in zanin khuakulh tungah kahtohpihin kulh pualamah bawm tawh a khaisuk uh hi.
Jerusalem khua-ah Saul pai a, thu um mite tawh kipawl dingin a vaihawm hi. Ahi zongin amaute in Saul pen thu um dingin na ngaihsun zolo uh ahih manin na kihta mahmah uh hi

Tua ciangin Barnabas in Saul hong huh a, sawltakte kiangah Saul a va paipih hi. Lam a pai laitakin Saul in Topa a muhna thu, Topa in Saul kiangah a thugennate, leh Damaskas khua-ah Saul in hangtakin Jesuh' min tawh thu a hilhnate khempeuh sawltakte kiangah a gensak hi
Tua ahih manin Saul zong sawltakte tawh kikhawl a, Jerusalem khuasungah vak kawikawi-in, Topa' min tawh hangtakin thu a hilh hi
Grik pau a zang Jew mite tawh zong thu genkhawmin kisel uh a, amaute in Saul thahdingin a vaihawm uh hi
A lawmte in hih thu a phawk uh ciangin Sisaria khua-ah Saul paipihsuk uh a, tua lai panin Tarsas khua-ah a ciahsak uh hi

Tua ahih manin Judea gam, Galilee gam, leh Samaria gamsunga om pawlpite in bawlsiatna thuak nawnloin nuamtakin om uh a, Topa zahtakna tawh gamta uh ahih manin Kha Siangtho huhna tawh a mi khangin a kibehlap uh hi.
Peter khualzinin pai kawikawi a, khatvei Lydda khua-a teng Pasian' mite kiangah a hawh hi
Tua khua a tun' ciangin a khutlekhe a zaw, kum giat sung tawntung lupna ngakin a om, Aineas kici mi khat a mu hi
Peter in tuapa kiangah, “Aineas aw, Jesuh Khrih in nang hong damsak hi; tho-in na lupna zial in,” a ci hi. Amah zong thakhatin thoto pah hi
Tua khua-a teng mi khempeuh leh Sharon zanglei-a teng mi khempeuh in Aineas mu uh ahih manin Topa a um uh hi.
Joppa khua-ah Pasian' thu a um, Tabitha min nei numei khat a om hi. (Tuanu' Grik min pen Dorkas hi a, sakhi a cihnopna ahi hi.) Tuanu a tawntungin a hoihin gamta-in mizawngte a huh hi
Tua laitakin amah a ci na-in a si hi. Amah a silkhit uh ciangin inndei tungnungah a sial uh hi

Joppa khua leh Lydda khua kigamlalo ahih manin, Joppa khua-a teng thu um mite in Lydda khua-ah Peter om hi, ci-in thu a zak uh ciangin Peter kiangah mi nih sawl uh a, “A manlang theithei-in ko kiangah hong pai in,” ci-in a samsak uh hi

Peter zong kithawi-in a samte tawh paikhawm pah a, tua khua a tun' ciangin inndei tungnungah a na paipihto pah uh hi. Tua lai-ah a na om meigong numei khempeuh in Peter na umcih uh a, Dorkas a hin' lai-in amaute-a' dingin a bawlsak puanakte leh puantungsilhte, a kahkawmun Peter kiangah a lak uh hi

Peter in innsung panin amaute khempeuh a pusuahsak khit ciangin khukdin'in thu a ngen hi. Tua ciangin misinu lamah kihei a, “Tabitha aw, tho in,” a cih ciangin a mit hong hak a, Peter a muh ciangin a tuto hi
Peter in a khut khakin a dingtosak hi. Tua ciangin thu um meigong numeite-a kipanin thu um khempeuh samkikin amaute kiangah Dorkas a nungta-in a lak hi
Joppa khuasung khempeuhah hih thu kitheikim a, mi tampi in Topa a um uh hi
Joppa khua-ah ni tampi sung Peter tamlai a, savunnim nasepin a nei Simon a kici mipa tawh a omkhawm hi.
